name: Hillary Clinton
subject: tonight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
The debate is tonight: | Friend --

Tonight is the first Democratic debate, and I would love for you to become an official Debate Donor before it starts. **[All you have to do is chip in $1 before tonight.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjM3MzEzMDYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMjk1MTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

It’s not about the money. It’s about knowing that when I step on that stage, you’ll be behind me. It means so much to know that you’re fighting for me, just like I’ll fight for you and your family every single day I’m in office.

**The debate is in a few hours. Are with me?**
[ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjM3MzEzMDYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMjk1MTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjM3MzEzMDYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMjk1MTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Hillary

**Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=25&ms=MjM3MzEzMDYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMjk1MTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=24&ms=MjM3MzEzMDYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMjk1MTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM3MzEzMDYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMjk1MTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjM3MzEzMDYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMjk1MTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjM3MzEzMDYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMjk1MTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjM3MzEzMDYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMjk1MTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjM3MzEzMDYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMjk1MTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Terry Sullivan, MarcoRubio.com
subject: a sad sight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44400123:6DTV6YL4N:m:1:1349778030:A26CC805C3AD940200C698ECF7245CAA:r)
---
| | | | Peter, Tonight, for the first time, the Democrats running for president will be on the debate stage together. Here's a preview of what you can expect:
* Has-been politicians with failed records (think Hillary Clinton's four years as secretary of state)
* Discredited, extreme ideas from yesterday (think Bernie Sanders's plans to put the whole country on single-payer health care)
* Blatant flip-flopping (think Hillary's reversal of her State Department's support for trade deals and the Keystone pipeline)

There's a better way: Marco has been spending this campaign talking about fresh, original ideas to make this next century a New American Century. The only problem: there's plenty of work to do to spread the word. Peter, as a personal favor to Marco, [_**will you click right here and make a contribution of $25, $50, or even $100**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44400122:6DTV6YL4N:m:1:1349778030:A26CC805C3AD940200C698ECF7245CAA:r) \-- whatever you can contribute to help let the American people know that there is a better way and a better future for our country? Thank you for your support. Sincerely, Terry SullivanCampaign ManagerMarco Rubio for President
---
| | [**Donate** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44400122:6DTV6YL4N:m:1:1349778030:A26CC805C3AD940200C698ECF7245CAA:r)
---
| | | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
---

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Leave Planned Parenthood alone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

Let's talk about what Republicans are really after when they hurl wild accusations at Planned Parenthood: **Winning political points with right-wing extremists.**

It's radical resume-building. And it's the surest way to become a Tea Party darling.

But this has become a dangerous charade -- especially since the Tea Party is gaining power and could actually elect one of their own to Speaker of the House. **It 's a scenario that would make their goal of defunding Planned Parenthood entirely attainable.**

[**That 's why you have to act today. Join me in telling Republicans to stop their attacks on Planned Parenthood. Add your signature to show your support.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2140/738133e4/3a4f53c2/7f817223/3118604449/VEsH/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e151013m")

Planned Parenthood and supporters like you and me have something on our side that the Tea Party doesn't. _We have the facts._

**The fact is that more than 2.7 million people rely on Planned Parenthood each year.** If Planned Parenthood was defunded, more than half could lose access to vital services like life-saving cancer screenings, prenatal care, contraception, and STI testing.

Defunding Planned Parenthood is just wrong. I won't stand for it, and I hope you won't either. Let's fight falsehoods with facts.

[**Add your name to mine and tell Republicans to leave Planned Parenthood alone once and for all.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2140/738133e4/3a4f53c2/7f817223/3118604449/VEsE/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e151013m")

Thanks,

Patrick | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2140/738133e4/3a4f53c2/7f81721c/3118604449/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2140/738133e4/3a4f53c2/7f81721d/3118604449/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

All content (C) 2015 Friends of Patrick Murphy, All Rights Reserved

name: Rand Paul
subject: Help me make history, Fellow Conservative
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

Saturday night my campaign proved it has the grassroots muscle to win when I placed first in the Republican Liberty Caucus Straw Poll.

My grassroots-centered campaign has swept the top spot in the three biggest straw polls of this primary cycle.

And we are doubling down on our commitment to make the grassroots the focus of this campaign by being the first ever to livestream an entire day on the trail.

**[To give you a sneak peak of my campaign's inner workings, you can watch this live stream as I campaign across Iowa](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30983338:WSUyGFmmN:m:1:879035888:8A99441906450C19DA2BDD1C3F6DB0C2:r)**.

After you check out the video, please **[chip in a contribution of $20.16](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30983338:WSUyGFmmN:m:1:879035888:8A99441906450C19DA2BDD1C3F6DB0C2:r)** so my campaign can continue to build on our grassroots momentum.

Fellow Conservative, with the first voting still over 4 months away, the media is kicking into overdrive to shape their narrative that this field needs to winnow down to a few "acceptable" Republicans.

Early poll numbers and celebrity are driving their coverage, but the winner of this primary will be determined by organization.

This campaign will be decided by one door knock, one phone call and one supporter identified at a time.

And so far my campaign has passed the test by winning the three most important straw polls -- including the biggest in the key early state of New Hampshire.

But even with this on-the-ground success, the liberal media is still enacting a virtual blackout to dismiss my campaign.

I know I'm not the handpicked candidate of the gatekeeper press or the Washington Machine.

But the big shots lined up against me never stopped me before.

That's because I have always been able to count on your support.

So in return, I'd like to give you a chance to experience a day in the life of my campaign for President.

You can **[click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30983338:WSUyGFmmN:m:1:879035888:8A99441906450C19DA2BDD1C3F6DB0C2:r)** to watch the first ever livestream of a day on the trail.

And after you check out the video, **[please chip in a contribution of $20.16 to help my campaign build on the success of a three for three sweep in the biggest straw polls of the primary cycle](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30983338:WSUyGFmmN:m:1:879035888:8A99441906450C19DA2BDD1C3F6DB0C2:r)**.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30983339:WSUyGFmmN:m:1:879035888:8A99441906450C19DA2BDD1C3F6DB0C2:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30983340:WSUyGFmmN:m:1:879035888:8A99441906450C19DA2BDD1C3F6DB0C2:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30983341:WSUyGFmmN:m:1:879035888:8A99441906450C19DA2BDD1C3F6DB0C2:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30983342:WSUyGFmmN:m:1:879035888:8A99441906450C19DA2BDD1C3F6DB0C2:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30983338:WSUyGFmmN:m:1:879035888:8A99441906450C19DA2BDD1C3F6DB0C2:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30983343:WSUyGFmmN:m:1:879035888:8A99441906450C19DA2BDD1C3F6DB0C2:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30983344:WSUyGFmmN:m:1:879035888:8A99441906450C19DA2BDD1C3F6DB0C2:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30983345:WSUyGFmmN:m:1:879035888:8A99441906450C19DA2BDD1C3F6DB0C2:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Team Marco
subject: Peter, want to play Bingo?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44402909:JvS3uYLN5:m:1:1349778030:2BF1A773E41B2D0427E259C78AD85E45:r)
---
| | | | Peter -- are you planning on watching the Democrat Debate tonight? If so, I hope you will join us this evening in playing some **[Democrat Debate Bingo.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44402910:JvS3uYLN5:m:1:1349778030:2BF1A773E41B2D0427E259C78AD85E45:r)**

Let us explain. Tonight we are certain to hear more of the same-old tired rhetoric from the Democrat candidates. We came up with a way to make listening to their foolish, liberal policies a little more fun, by creating **[Democrat Debate Bingo!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44402910:JvS3uYLN5:m:1:1349778030:2BF1A773E41B2D0427E259C78AD85E45:r)**
---
| | [**PLAY DEMOCRAT DEBATE BINGO NOW >>** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44402910:JvS3uYLN5:m:1:1349778030:2BF1A773E41B2D0427E259C78AD85E45:r)
---
| **[You can join us in playing, by following this link right now!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44402910:JvS3uYLN5:m:1:1349778030:2BF1A773E41B2D0427E259C78AD85E45:r)**

Will Hillary bash the GOP? How long will it take for Bernie and Hillary to praise Obamacare? We are certain to hear that and much more -- so I hope you will join me in keeping track of the outlandish rhetoric by watching the Democrat Debate tonight.

Each Bingo board is unique, so make sure you see how many boards you can complete before CNN's Anderson Cooper closes the night.

Please forward this email to your friends and family and encourage them to play as well. **Peter, will you be the first to shout, "BINGO?"**

While this interactive Bingo board is meant for good fun; the policies the Democrats plan to implement if they win the White House are down right scary.

That's why we need your help. Marco is best candidate to take on any of the Democrats on the stage tonight, but he needs our help to win.

So, Peter, after you've won Bingo, [**can we count on you to chip in at least $25 before the end of the Debate?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44402910:JvS3uYLN5:m:1:1349778030:2BF1A773E41B2D0427E259C78AD85E45:r)

We hope you are planning on watching the Democrat Debate, and **[please play along with us with your very own interactive Bingo board by clicking here!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44402910:JvS3uYLN5:m:1:1349778030:2BF1A773E41B2D0427E259C78AD85E45:r)**

\- Team Marco

name: Jane O'Meara Sanders
subject: Are you excited for the debate tonight?
body:
#
Friend -
Many of you know the story of how I first met Bernie: I organized a debate while he was running for Mayor of Burlington, Vermont. When I heard him speak, he embodied everything I had ever believed in. I just fell in love that night ... with his ideas. And shortly after with Bernie himself.
Today, we're together in Las Vegas, Nevada, for the first presidential debate of our campaign. I hope you'll watch. It starts at 8:30 p.m. Eastern / 5:30 p.m. Pacific on CNN. It will also be streamed live on CNN's website.
We're all a little bit nervous. It will be the first time Bernie gets a chance to share his message with a national audience of millions of people at once. But we're also excited for the opportunity. I am sure you feel the same way.
Before the debate starts, let Bernie know you're with him.
[**Sign the card our campaign created wishing Bernie good luck before tonight 's debate.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb25ad/43f17890/54bc8ca2/621f9632/274543766/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/good-luck-debate?source=em151013")
I hear there are also over 3,500 debate watch parties taking place at locations across the country. I know that it means a lot to Bernie knowing that so many people are in his corner tonight. It does to me, as well.
Thank you so much for all of your support.
Jane O'Meara Sanders
Bernie 2016

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb25ad/43f17890/54bc8ca2/621f9633/274543766/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=em151013debates")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb25ad/43f17890/54bc8ca2/621f9630/274543766/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb25ad/43f17890/54bc8ca2/621f9631/274543766/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb25ad/43f17890/54bc8ca2/621f963e/274543766/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb25ad/43f17890/54bc8ca2/621f963f/274543766/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bobby=20Jindal?=
subject: Incredibly weak
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jindal For President
body:
|
---
| | Tonight is the first Democrat debate. Since the press is not covering it much, here is a quick report from the Democrat primary:

The Democrat candidate in fifth place thinks that America should be using the Metric System.

The Democrat candidate in fourth place claims that ISIS was caused by climate change, and he apologized for saying that “all lives matter.”

The Democrat candidate in third place doesn’t actually appear to be campaigning.

The Democrat candidate in second place calls himself a socialist...which by the way means he is more honest than the candidate in first place.

And the Democrat candidate in first place is under investigation by the FBI.

It’s no wonder the Democrats are scared of debates. Their candidates are incredibly weak, and their ideas are worse.

[](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=f9a5bb37dd&e=724c64cfa7)

Now is the time to embrace our conservative principles, not run from them. In Louisiana, I have governed as a conservative. **I am the only one running for President who has actually cut spending** , and I have detailed policy plans to repeal Obamacare, improve our broken education system, fix our unfair tax system, and more.

We can take our country back. But I need your help to do it. [Please make a special donation of $20.16 right now to help put a principled conservative back in the White House.](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=a730631b0a&e=724c64cfa7)

Thank you,
Bobby

P.S. Please make sure to [“like” our campaign Facebook page](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=32754c0a7e&e=724c64cfa7) for updates from the campaign trail.

---
| | | Paid for by Jindal For President
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2015 JINDAL FOR PRESIDENT, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email as a supporter of Bobby Jindal

**Our mailing address is:**
JINDAL FOR PRESIDENTP.O. BOX 5101BATON ROUGE, LA 70821
[Add us to your address book](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage.com/vcard?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=36e884e022)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage.com/profile?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=36e884e022&e=724c64cfa7) or [unsubscribe from this list](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=36e884e022&e=724c64cfa7&c=8e1015fca9)

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: this would mean a lot to me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Just a few more hours! | Friend --

In a few hours, I'll be on the debate stage telling millions of people about our ideas for how to make all of our futures brighter.

Before I step up to the podium, it would mean a lot to know you have my back. Will you chip in $1 to become a Debate Donor?

**I know that if we stand together, we can make this a great moment for our team. Become a Debate Donor now, and let's show everyone watching just how strong we are:**
[ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjM3Mzk5NTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMzczMTQyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you,

Hillary
